title: Kevduit.com
problem: Content Creator Kevin "Kevduit" wanted to update his site to have a better "Where is Minerva?" page. Part of this change was moving from Wordpress to have more control over advertising and content as well as website look.
solution: I have been working on his solution for a few months now with a fully automated "Where is Minerva?" page using some special methods in order to maximize efficiency. I used astro static site building feature to have dynamic frontmatter variables that would define new weeks and items on a website rebuild. Using cron and netlify scheduled functions allowed me to consistently schedule regular updates so the website accurately shows Minerva's current inventory. I am still working on solving the blog hosting solution we are attempting to rollout.
